use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use asleap because A tool for exploiting Cisco LEAP networks.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use asleap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `asleap [options] [args]` as documented upstream for asleap.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair asleap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `asleap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
